---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or a meaningful behaviour change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve

Describe the scenario where the current version of SafeView does not do what you need. The more concrete, the better. "I want to share my computer with my kids but I only want filtering on when they are the ones watching" is a much better motivation than "add profiles".

## What you would like SafeView to do

Describe the behaviour you want, not the implementation. The maintainer will figure out the implementation after understanding the desired behaviour.

## Alternatives you considered

If you have thought about other solutions — for example extensions, Chrome settings, manual workflows — mention them. Helps avoid duplicating work.

## Scope check

- [ ] This feature keeps all frames on the local machine
- [ ] This feature does not require a paid cloud API
- [ ] This feature is about the Chrome extension (not a separate mobile app, not a server-side product)

## Anything else

Links to comparable features in other tools, mockups, anything that would save back-and-forth in the triage conversation.
